schema.id: stable identifier, referenced across eval runs to track a question's metrics over time
schema.question: the natural-language question sent to POST /query during an eval run
schema.ground_truth: the correct answer, used by context_precision (and for human sanity-checking faithfulness/answer_relevancy scores)
schema.reference_contexts: exact excerpt(s) from eval/golden_corpus/ that should have been retrieved to answer correctly; empty list for expected_refusal items, since no supporting passage exists
schema.source_documents: which eval/golden_corpus/ files reference_contexts were drawn from, so the eval harness knows what to ingest

items.question: How many days do I have to request a refund after purchase?
items.ground_truth: Customers may request a refund within 30 days of purchase for any paid subscription plan.
reference_contexts: Northwind Cloud Storage customers may request a refund within 30 days of purchase for any paid subscription plan.

items.question: How long does it take for a refund to be processed once approved?
items.ground_truth: Refunds are processed to the original payment method within 5-7 business days.
reference_contexts: Refunds are processed to the original payment method within 5-7 business days.

items.question: How long does international shipping take for the hardware security key?
items.ground_truth: International orders of the hardware security key ship within 10-14 business days.
reference_contexts: International orders ship within 10-14 business days.

items.question: What response time SLA does an Enterprise-tier customer get from support?
items.ground_truth: Enterprise-tier customers are assigned a dedicated support engineer and receive a guaranteed 1-hour response time.
reference_contexts: Enterprise-tier customers are assigned a dedicated support engineer and receive a guaranteed 1-hour response time under their support SLA.

items.question: What encryption standard is used to protect files at rest?
items.ground_truth: Files stored on Northwind Cloud Storage are encrypted at rest using AES-256.
reference_contexts: All files stored on Northwind Cloud Storage are encrypted at rest using AES-256 and in transit using TLS 1.3.

items.question: How much storage does the Business plan include, and what does it cost per month?
items.ground_truth: The Business plan costs $29/month and includes 1 TB of storage.
reference_contexts: The Business plan costs $29/month and includes 1 TB of storage with priority chat and email support.

items.question: How long is my data kept after I cancel my account before it's deleted?
items.ground_truth: After cancellation, account data is retained for 30 days to allow for reactivation, after which it is permanently deleted.
reference_contexts: After cancellation, account data is retained for 30 days to allow for reactivation, after which all files and account data are permanently deleted.

items.question: Does the Business plan include chat support, and what response time can I expect?
items.ground_truth: Yes, the Business plan includes priority chat and email support, with a target response time of 4 hours, 24/7.
reference_contexts: The Business plan costs $29/month and includes 1 TB of storage with priority chat and email support.
Business-tier customers receive priority email and chat support with a target response time of 4 hours, 24/7.

items.question: If I cancel my monthly plan partway through the billing cycle, will I get a prorated refund, and how long before my data is deleted?
items.ground_truth: No, monthly plans are non-refundable once the 30-day window has closed, and cancelling mid-cycle does not entitle you to a prorated refund either way. Your account data is retained for 30 days after cancellation, then permanently deleted.
reference_contexts: Annual plans are refunded on a pro-rated basis after the first 30 days; monthly plans are non-refundable once the 30-day window has closed.
Cancelling mid-cycle does not entitle the customer to a prorated refund for the current billing period under the standard refund policy.
After cancellation, account data is retained for 30 days to allow for reactivation, after which all files and account data are permanently deleted.

items.question: Which is the cheapest plan that includes 24/7 priority support, and what's its response time target?
items.ground_truth: The Business plan ($29/month) is the cheapest plan with 24/7 priority support, targeting a 4-hour response time.
reference_contexts: The Business plan costs $29/month and includes 1 TB of storage with priority chat and email support.
Business-tier customers receive priority email and chat support with a target response time of 4 hours, 24/7.

items.question: What HTTP status code do I get if I exceed my daily API request limit?
items.ground_truth: Exceeding the daily API request limit returns an HTTP 429 response until the limit resets at midnight UTC.
reference_contexts: Exceeding the daily limit returns an HTTP 429 response until the limit resets at midnight UTC.

items.question: How many API requests per day does the Standard plan allow?
items.ground_truth: The Standard plan is limited to 1,000 API requests per day.
reference_contexts: The Standard plan is limited to 1,000 API requests per day; the Business plan allows 10,000 requests per day; the Enterprise plan has no fixed rate limit and instead uses a fair-use policy.

items.question: How long is a data export download link available before it expires?
items.ground_truth: Exports are available for download for 7 days before the export link expires.
reference_contexts: Exports are packaged as a single ZIP archive and are available for download for 7 days before the export link expires.

items.question: In what format is file version history exported?
items.ground_truth: File version history is exported as a JSON manifest alongside the files.
reference_contexts: Metadata, including folder structure and file version history, is exported as a JSON manifest alongside the files.

items.question: Does the Standard plan support shared team folders?
items.ground_truth: No, the Standard plan is single-user only and does not support shared folders.
reference_contexts: The Standard plan is single-user only and does not support shared folders.

items.question: How much does it cost to add an extra team seat beyond the Business plan's included seats?
items.ground_truth: Additional team seats can be purchased for $5/month per seat.
reference_contexts: Each Business plan subscription includes up to 10 team member seats; additional seats can be purchased for $5/month per seat.

items.question: How much account credit do I get for a successful referral?
items.ground_truth: Both the referrer and the new customer receive a $10 account credit.
reference_contexts: When a referred customer subscribes to a paid plan, both the referrer and the new customer receive a $10 account credit.

items.question: How long do unused referral credits stay valid before they expire?
items.ground_truth: Referral credits expire if unused after 12 months.
reference_contexts: Referral credits are applied automatically within 3 business days of the referred customer's first successful payment and expire if unused after 12 months.

items.question: After how many hours without an update does an unresolved critical support issue get escalated to engineering?
items.ground_truth: Unresolved critical issues are automatically escalated to engineering after 2 hours without update.
reference_contexts: Unresolved critical issues are automatically escalated to engineering after 2 hours without update.

items.question: What security certification does Northwind hold, and how often is it audited?
items.ground_truth: Northwind is SOC 2 Type II certified and undergoes an independent security audit annually.
reference_contexts: Northwind is SOC 2 Type II certified and undergoes an independent security audit annually.

items.question: As a Business plan customer, what support response time can I expect and how many API requests am I allowed per day?
items.ground_truth: Business-tier customers get a target support response time of 4 hours, 24/7, and are allowed 10,000 API requests per day.
reference_contexts: Business-tier customers receive priority email and chat support with a target response time of 4 hours, 24/7.
The Standard plan is limited to 1,000 API requests per day; the Business plan allows 10,000 requests per day; the Enterprise plan has no fixed rate limit and instead uses a fair-use policy.

items.question: On the Enterprise plan, is there a fixed API rate limit, and what support response time is guaranteed?
items.ground_truth: No, the Enterprise plan has no fixed API rate limit and instead uses a fair-use policy; it comes with a guaranteed 1-hour support response time from a dedicated support engineer.
reference_contexts: The Standard plan is limited to 1,000 API requests per day; the Business plan allows 10,000 requests per day; the Enterprise plan has no fixed rate limit and instead uses a fair-use policy.
Enterprise-tier customers are assigned a dedicated support engineer and receive a guaranteed 1-hour response time under their support SLA.

items.question: How much does the Business plan cost per month, and how many team seats does that include?
items.ground_truth: The Business plan costs $29/month and includes up to 10 team member seats.
reference_contexts: The Business plan costs $29/month and includes 1 TB of storage with priority chat and email support.
Each Business plan subscription includes up to 10 team member seats; additional seats can be purchased for $5/month per seat.

items.question: If I'm on the Standard plan and want to start sharing folders with teammates, which plan would I need to upgrade to, and what would it cost per month?
items.ground_truth: You would need to upgrade to the Business plan, which supports shared team folders and costs $29/month.
reference_contexts: The Standard plan is single-user only and does not support shared folders.
The Business plan costs $29/month and includes 1 TB of storage with priority chat and email support.
